name: Desta: The Memories Between
short_description: Fall into a beautiful and puzzling dreamworld. Find your friends, unlock spectacular abilities and overcome the odds in a surreal tactical dodgeball adventure to uncover the mysteries of a broken world from the creators of Monument Valley.
detailed_description:
Find the right words to say and overcome conflicts in Desta: The Memories Between, a cosy team-based tactics adventure.

Every night, Desta falls into the mysterious world, filled with shattered remnants of locations past, memories of regret-filled relationships, and dodgeballs that can change the course of conversation and the future of this world.

PLAY TACTICAL, PHYSICS-BASED ENCOUNTERS

  • Overcome tactical challenges with perfect throws, shoot wild trick shots and land sensational hits in turn-based sports-style encounters. As nights progress, Desta becomes experienced and attuned to this surreal world, discovering new abilities and ways to win

TEAM UP WITH POWERFUL FRIENDS

  • Brought to life with a full voice cast, Desta meets incredible characters throughout their journey, all with exceptional abilities and powers, each with their own story to tell about their connection to this world

A CHALLENGING NIGHTMARE

  • Once you build up your skills, take on Nightmare Mode for the ultimate hardcore tactics challenge where EVERY throw matters



Dream Team Edition is the digital collector’s edition of Desta: The Memories Between - compiling all major content updates together, including all characters, new game modes (including Challenge Mode and Nightmare Mode), as well a complete game soundtrack composed by acclaimed UK Artist Mansur Brown and a beautiful Digital Art Book.





ustwo games are proud independent developers, best known for the award-winning Monument Valley series, Land’s End, Assemble with Care and Alba: A Wildlife Adventure

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Arabic, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
